instruction: Go forward by the windows, and then stop by the lamp.

text: I notice a window on the right side and a doorway to the left, so I should turn around to get a better sense of the space before moving forward toward the windows.
I see a window on the wall and a doorway to the left. Let me look around to orient myself.
I'm standing in a doorway looking into a room with a table and painting on the right side, and I'm turning to explore what else is visible in this space.

I'm looking at a hallway with wooden flooring and windows or doors lining the left side—this seems to be the corridor running forward by the windows. I should keep turning to finish mapping out the space.

I've completed a full rotation and identified the key directions: the initial view shows a window and door, turning left reveals a doorway to another room with a table, and at 180° there's a hallway with windows and glass doors along the left side that appears to be the main path forward. I'll head toward that hallway.
The hallway with windows along its side (seen at 180°) matches "go forward by the windows". Let me turn to face it.
I'm navigating through a hallway that angles slightly to the left, so I'll move forward and adjust my direction accordingly, turning left as I progress down the wooden corridor.
Now facing the hallway with windows. Moving forward along it.
I'm positioned too close to the right wall, so I need to shift left and move forward into the hallway that opens toward a room with a fireplace and seating area.
I'm navigating through a room with windows on the right side, moving forward past them toward a lamp I can see near the sofa in the living room ahead on the left.
I can see windows on the right and a lamp ahead-left near the sofa area. Moving forward along the windows.
I spot the lamp with its white shade on the left side by the sofa, so I need to move forward and angle slightly left toward it—it's roughly 4 to 5 meters ahead.
The lamp with white shade is visible ahead-left by the sofa. Continuing forward.
I see a lamp with a white shade positioned ahead and to the left, behind the sofa at about 3-4 meters away. I should move forward a bit more and shift slightly left to head toward it.
The lamp is clearly ahead-left. Approaching it.

I see a lamp with a large white shade positioned to the left behind the sofa, roughly 2.5 to 3 meters away. I should move closer—I'll take a couple more steps forward while angling slightly left toward it.
The lamp is just ahead-left behind the sofa. Getting closer.
The lamp is positioned just ahead and to the left, roughly 1 to 1.5 meters away on the console table behind the sofa, putting me within 3 meters of it.
I've reached the lamp and can see its white shade clearly from close range. I'm stopping here.

Episode complete. I followed the instruction: moved forward along the hallway with windows on the right, entered the living room, and stopped right next to the lamp with the large white shade behind the sofa (~1–1.5 m away), issuing STOP within the 3-meter goal radius. Total actions used: 66 of 500.
